---
title: "Gbocho Alexandre"
---

# Applied Mathematician

**Berlin, Germany**

I am specialized in Mathematical Optimization and Control. 
I cultivated an interest in interdisciplinary works where advanced Mathematical tools and techniques are required. From Process Engineering, Robotics, Biotechnology (in particular, biofuels and biogazs) and System Identification. 

My mission, is to create tools that help engineers and scientist to build better models.


[👉 View all repositories](https://github.com/AlexN7-Shepard?tab=repositories)
